detail: get_best_ask() was reading worst ask (~0.99) instead of best (~0.45-0.60) for 19 days due to wrong sort order. Fix: min(asks). Post-fix: 9 signals fired within 1 minute, 8 live fills in 5-minute window
Oracle lag, pair-sum arb, and FIFO maker rebate all falsified. Three theses, multiple weeks of data, decisive falsification

activity_monitor.py:1192 - bet_size = min(PAPER_BET_SIZE_USD, bet_size). CB_MAX_DRAWDOWN_USD raised to 500 via systemd drop-in. 157 T2 wallets polling

95.7% of pre-cull edge (+$107.45 of +$112.29) was in wallets the Apr 13 cull removed or demoted. Only 1 of top 20 pre-cull earners still active T2. Wallet-selection bug, not strategy failure. Candidate action: selective restore of 8 top-20 wallets with n>=3 and WR>=80%
194W/112L confirms post-cull paper run is meaningful. Enough sample to evaluate gate. Also confirms cull was the problem

Four-layer memory (working/episodic/semantic/personal) + protocols + skills. CLAUDE.md at /root/ auto-loads rules. Purpose: eliminate copy-paste between Claude Chat and Claude Code, kill /mnt/project drift, persistent context across sessions

Second run after skill fix: zero service-name errors, real CopyBot settled numbers (57.5% WR on n=127 trailing 24h, continuing drift from 63% at n=306). Claude Code improvised to find NewsBot gate_status.json (richer than skill asked for) and KrajekBot live_trades.jsonl (52 trades, 248 to target). Skill now v2026-04-18c absorbs both discoveries. Scaffold thesis validated on day 1.

action: Fill-gap interventions LIVE: POLL 60->15s + max_gap=0.05 reject

Effective cycle time improved ~37% (92s→58s) not 4x — scan time is the floor, not sleep. Expected mean gap drops toward +0.015 (revised from earlier +0.005-0.010 estimate). Concurrent Claude session PID 1897871 detected but not actively editing /opt/copybot. Tomorrow's morning check compares pre/post; CB-DECAY-MONITOR gate answerable Mon.

action: Built strategic-review skill (Layer 1 of pipeline progression)
detail: Skill triages ScoutBot SCT-AUTO output weekly: groups by type, cross-refs FALSIFIED.md, estimates cost/upside per surviving thread. Explicit constraints: no decisions, no backtests, no P&L projections — pure triage. First real run produced STRATEGIC_THREADS_2026-04-19.md. Layer 2 (hypothesis backtest) and Layer 3 (pre-live gate) deferred until Layer 1 proves useful over 2-3 weekly runs.
